"cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-191", "name": "Integer Underflow (Wrap or Wraparound)"}], "description": "### Impact
`VestingContract::can_change_balance` returns `AccountError::InsufficientFunds` when `new_balance < min_cap`, but it constructs the error using `balance: self.balance - min_cap`. `Coin::sub` panics on underflow, so if an attacker can reach a state where `min_cap > balance`, the node crashes while trying to return an error.

The `min_cap > balance` precondition is attacker-reachable because the vesting contract creation data (32-byte format) allows encoding `total_amount` without validating `total_amount <= transaction.value` (the real contract balance). After creating such a vesting contract, the attacker can broadcast an outgoing transaction to trigger the panic during mempool admission and block processing.

### Patches
[The patch for this vulnerability](https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/commit/4d01946f0b3d6c6e31786f91cdfb3eb902908da0) is included as part of [v1.3.0](https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/releases/tag/v1.3.0).

### Workarounds
No known workarounds.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00275, "percentile": 0.19009}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-vc34-39q2-m6q3", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-22T19:18:55Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vc34-39q2-m6q3", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-vc34-39q2-m6q3"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-34064"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T20:16:40Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T19:18:55Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/security/advisories/GHSA-vc34-39q2-m6q3", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/pull/3658", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/commit/4d01946f0b3d6c6e31786f91cdfb3eb902908da0", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/releases/tag/v1.3.0", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-34064", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vc34-39q2-m6q3"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/security-advisories/GHSA-vc34-39q2-m6q3", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross", "summary": "nimiq-account: Vesting insufficient funds error can panic", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-27T16:22:15Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-vc34-39q2-m6q3", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "nimiq-account"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.2.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: nimiq-account: Vesting insufficient funds error can panic
